# Pull request

## What this changes

A clear description of the change.

## Why

The motivation — what use case or problem this addresses.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds capability)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would affect existing users)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Agent prompt / principle change
- [ ] Template change
- [ ] CI / repo housekeeping

## How I tested it

- [ ] Ran the agent on a real course's materials and reviewed output
- [ ] Manually checked example notes against the conventions doc
- [ ] Ran broken-link audit on a sample vault
- [ ] N/A (docs / templates only)

## Checklist

- [ ] My change follows the conventions in `docs/conventions.md`
- [ ] I updated relevant docs if behaviour changed
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No personal data, API keys, or vault contents are included in this PR
- [ ] Examples I added are anonymised (no real names, emails, paths)

## Additional notes

Anything else reviewers should know.
